response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, and deep systems expertise in event-driven architectures and real-time systems — but lacks clear evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech environments, scaling engineering teams to 30+, or designing multi-agent frameworks with financial risk integration, which are core to the role.
strengths: Proven experience building event-driven, real-time systems with DLang and Node.js at scale.
Hands-on contribution to agentic AI infrastructure and tooling at re:cinq.
Strong open-source contributions and architectural fluency across distributed systems.
concerns: No explicit track record in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulated AI deployment.
Lacks demonstrated experience leading engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers.
No evidence of designing model-agnostic multi-agent frameworks with feedback loops for financial decisioning.
